title: Recipe nutrition calculation and immutable snapshot
summary: 승인된 재료 영양·대표 환산만 사용해 recipe nutrient vectors와 completeness/quality를 결정론적으로 계산하고 immutable snapshot, Recipe Detail projection, nullable Meal pin으로 제공한다.
goal: Sparse public-data coverage를 거짓 complete나 0으로 숨기지 않으면서 사용자가 Recipe Detail에서 재현 가능한 예상 영양을 확인하고 과거 Recipe Meal이 생성 시점 snapshot을 유지하게 한다.

owners.claude: replaced only for the user-approved nutrition/products/planner program; global stage-owner policy is unchanged
owners.codex: role-separated fresh Codex sessions own Stage 1 authoring, independent Stage 1.5 review/repair-final, Stage 2 backend, Stage 3 review, Stage 4 frontend, authority precheck, Stage 5/final authority, and Stage 6; no author or implementer self-approves

dependencies: public data pilot PR #1005 merged at 3866952c3e81bedfd80593f576e5ed6183ec7538 with reviewed head 028c6e8f13d3c8586bbbfaa9dad42f0ae65c1420
nutrition products planner contract PR #1006 merged at 6d01d8ac9f4861036ade4e6b97b20275c7f2a6c8 with reviewed head 81ddb4d5c4bbd320c01f9a91a40d89632193e619
user-approved recipe snapshot attribution repair dated 2026-07-15 is locked in official v1.7.19/v1.5.25/v1.3.22/v1.3.20/v1.2.24
ingredient nutrition conversion model implementation lineage merged through PR #1004
final FoodSafety-30 pilot logical batch 7ede683988d9c23d0a89416d9b237df6b01e3a2720f045b96dbf11253ff833bc and approved handoff checksum 457b70404e88564ab0e3d26d7d7e0d35db87babfa607b9472d1ac683538e1dcf

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/recipe-nutrition-calculator.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-snapshot.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-api.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-rls.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/recipe-nutrition-calculator.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-snapshot.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-api.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-rls.test.ts

out_of_scope: Prepared food public or private catalog and immutable product nutrition versions
Product planner entry CRUD and recipe product read model adapter
Meal day week planner nutrition aggregate
Shopping cooking leftover XP or activity product exclusions
Medical advice actual consumption targets barcode OCR dining out meal kit
Cooking yield retention absorption disposal precision modeling
Runtime public API refresh unreviewed promotion fuzzy matching generic density or piece conversion
notes: Stage 1 docs were authored in a fresh Codex session from contract base 6d01d8ac9f4861036ade4e6b97b20275c7f2a6c8 and rebased onto predecessor-closeout master 842093048f7b5cc9996bc85e886405ad6788e9c5. An author-separated Codex Stage 1.5 review approved current head 5f75afc4030facccebd4ea74314cab7d18032c44 with unresolved required findings 0 and required validators green. Stage 2 started on feature/be-recipe-nutrition-calculation. Existing confirmed RECIPE_DETAIL is an anchor-extension: generator and critic are intentionally not required because no new screen or interaction model is introduced, while Stage 4 before/after evidence at 390px, 320px, desktop and Stage 5/final authority are required. Current public-data coverage is intentionally sparse at 13/124 ingredients and at least one link in 21/30 recipes; missing data must remain partial or unavailable.
